hero.title: Vote Smart. Vote Informed.
hero.subtitle: Your AI-powered assistant for navigating Indian elections — from finding candidates to locating your polling booth.

assistant.title: ElectAssist AI
assistant.default_greeting: Hi {{name}}! I'm your ElectAssist AI. I noticed you're interested in learning more about Indian politics. Where would you like to start? I can explain how elections work, the difference between Rajya Sabha and Lok Sabha, or how you can get your voter ID.
assistant.error_insights: Sorry, I couldn't get those insights right now.
assistant.error_connection: Sorry, I'm having trouble connecting right now. Please make sure your API key is configured correctly.
assistant.initial_state_query: Tell me more about the political situation in {{state}}.

how_it_works.title: How It Works
how_it_works.subtitle: Three simple steps to become an informed voter
how_it_works.step1_desc: Get AI-summarized manifesto breakdowns and unbiased candidate comparisons for your constituency.
how_it_works.step2_desc: Locate your nearest polling station with real-time navigation and estimated wait times.
how_it_works.step3_desc: Access your personalized voter roadmap with registration deadlines, documents needed, and more.

features.title: Built for Every Indian Voter
features.subtitle: Powerful features designed with accessibility and inclusivity at heart
features.multilingual_desc: Available in 9+ Indian languages so every citizen can participate.
features.ai_powered_desc: Gemini AI provides personalized, unbiased guidance tailored to you.
features.realtime_desc: Live candidate data, booth locations, and election updates at your fingertips.
features.privacy_desc: Your data stays on your device. We never share personal voter information.

cta_section.title: Ready to Vote Smart?
cta_section.subtitle: Join thousands of informed voters. Create your account in under a minute.

login.title: Welcome Back
login.subtitle: Sign in to access your voter dashboard

register.title: Create Your Account
register.subtitle: Join ElectAssist and become an informed voter
register.language_detect: Based on your state, you might prefer
register.language_question: Would you like to switch to {{language}}?
register.age_error: You must be at least 18 years old to register as a voter.
register.voter_id_error: Voter ID should be 3 letters followed by 7 digits (e.g. ABC1234567)
register.password_weak: Password must be at least 6 characters

dashboard.analytics_desc: Content and analytics for {{state}} will be displayed here.
dashboard.feature_live: Live election results and vote counting
dashboard.explore_globe: Explore India's states on the interactive globe below

onboarding.title: Complete Your Profile
onboarding.subtitle: Please provide a few details so we can customize your dashboard.
onboarding.new_to_politics_desc: We can help you understand the Indian political landscape with our AI assistant.
onboarding.error_age: You must be at least 18 years old to vote.

globe.click_state: 🖱️ Click a state to view constituencies
